allow: Bash(echo "---CLAUDE.md---"; cat CLAUDE.md; echo; echo "---AGENTS.md---"; cat AGENTS.md; echo "---.claude here---"; ls -la .claude; echo "---backup---"; ls -la ../UNIsport-claude-bak)
Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "chore: scaffold Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4 app and add CLAUDE.md project rules")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "docs: add planned database schema \(universities, profiles, gyms, sessions, matches, channels, messages\) — not connected")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(gyms\): gym list screen with search bar, All/Main/House filters, main + house cards \(crowd indicators removed\); add gym data, icon set, temp profile stub")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(onboarding\): shared 9-step shell + Screen 1 \(Basics\), flow state/profile object, routing after login, data file \(classYears/freshmanClassYear/gender\), dev replay")
Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(onboarding\): rename Gender->Sex \(Male/Female\), set class years to '27-'30, freshmanClassYear='30")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(onboarding\): Screen 2 Where you live + reusable searchable dropdown \(Yard dorms vs 12 houses via freshmanClassYear\); rename partnerGender->partnerPreference")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(onboarding\): Screen 3 primary activity cards + experience levels + conditional inputs \(split/distance+pace/cardio type/other\), data-driven with gating")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(onboarding\): Screen 4 Top gyms - pick + rank top 3 \(tap reorder, remove\), reuses searchable dropdown; verified gym list from gym data")
Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(onboarding\): Screen 5 When you train - 7-day grid, tap-to-expand inline time blocks, stores days+blocks")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(onboarding\): Screen 7 Preferences - training type, partner preference, peer-advising + gym-mentorship toggles; add Toggle/Section controls")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "fix\(onboarding\): Screen 7 mentorship toggles conditional on class year \(freshman vs upperclassman\) and experience \(beginner/advanced/intermediate\); reset ineligible answers")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(onboarding\): Screen 9 Notifications \(bell, notify list, gold Enable CTA + Maybe later\) completes flow into Gyms; log full profile")
Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "docs\(CLAUDE.md\): refresh GitHub-connected note, add project map + how-to-hand-over-work section")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(profile\): My Profile top half - identity \(avatar, inline name, VARSITY/Mentor badges\), editable bio, Sessions/Partners/Following stats; fake currentUser data + InlineEdit; no streaks")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(profile\): move VARSITY/Mentor badges under name; edit name+bio only via pencil \(with grey hover circle\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="UNIsport Dev" -c user.email="dev@unisport.local" commit -q -m "feat\(auth\): Log in / Sign up toggle \(shouldCreateUser differentiates\), clear error messages incl. failed magic-link bounce")
